anomalies.message: Solutions Markdown section '二' contains both choice questions (1-5) and solution section '三' content (1-3) without a separate '三、' heading. Handled by deterministic structure repair — content correctly split to Q6-Q10 and Q11-Q13.
Paper Markdown stem for Q19 contains OCR noise: '\pmb {\text {又 向 量}}' in the LaTeX for β. Cosmetic only, no mathematical impact.
